title: Snowkingdom 2 Pieces Gold Table Runner, Sequin Glitter Foil Metallic Thin Mesh Runner Roll 11"x108", Gold Table Decorations for Event Party, Wedding, Birthday Party, Christmas
features: Metallic Gold Table Runner:Stylized polyester netting with metallic gold foil, easy care and long-lasting durability. Size - Width 11 inch x length 108 inch (2 PCS) .It can satisfy your daily use for most tables. Ramp up the glam with this shimmering gold runner

Unique Design:The gold glitter table runner can be cut to any length and shape according to your needs.You can use these table runners to decorate your rooms or for all kinds of DIY projects.The quantity is sufficient to meet your decoration needs for daily life or holidays

Exquisite Table Decorations:The metal foil printing exudes a subtle luster, add some luxury shimmer to your table with this wedding table runner very unique bringing an extra layer of glamour to your party. The modern chic look appearances can easily catch the eyes of your guests

Suitable Scenes: Perfect for wedding party, bridal & baby shower, birthday party, Halloween/Thanksgiving/Christmas party, graduation party, romantic candlelight dinner, holiday, valentine date, banquet, special events and daily use
Guarantee: If you have any problems about the party table runner, , please contact us at any time, and the customer service will provide customers with satisfactory solutions
description: Product Description Sparkle Table Runner This gold glitter table runner is a great way to style your tabletop for dinner parties, birthday,weddings, or other elegant events on a budget, bringing an extra layer of glamour to your event. The elegant decoration is wonderful for centerpieces, beautiful gold table runner will enhance your home and dinning experience. The unique sparkly metallic gold foil print offers some subtle shimmer, The modern and chic appearance is very distinctive and can catch the eyes of your guests.The fabric is thin and open so you can still see the table, easily to match your home decors. Features Material: Polyester netting with glitter gold metallic foil, durable, disposable, no ironing needed Gold DIY Runner : Lengths fit most tables, you can easy to cut it for any size .It can also be used as placemats, bouquet wraps, wedding chairs decoration, gift wrapping... Suitable for: Gold table runners for round/square/rectangle tables Occasion：Perfect for birthday table runner, wedding table runner, party table runner,new year table runner, christmas table runner, baby shower table runner, bridal shower table runner Package Include: 2pcs 11 inches W x 108 inch L（28cmx275cm）Gold Table Runner Roll Note:Just wipe with a damp cloth if needed Wide usages: DIY design: The glitter table runner is long enough, which is easy to cut. Gold centerpieces for table: The table runner adds glamour to your parties and other special occasions. Impress your guests and audience. Elegant gold table decoration for a wedding /party /birthday. Exquisite gift: The gold metallic runner can be given as a wonderful gift to others.
